CustomField.description: Traffic-light health derived from schedule position and status. Formula field.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Closed"), "Complete", IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "On Hold"), "Amber", IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK(End_Date__c)), End_Date__c < TODAY(), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Closing"))), "Red", "Green")))
CustomField.label: Health
